prompt: A dramatic vertical concert poster photograph shot from the audience at stage level, showing a single male performer in full-body silhouette standing powerfully at center stage with legs apart, holding a microphone to his mouth in one hand. He wears a dark oversized t-shirt, very baggy cargo pants, a cap, and a chain necklace, with his face mostly hidden in shadow. Behind him is a massive packed indoor arena with thousands of fans, glowing phone lights, raised hands, and a curved stadium seating bowl. The lighting is intense magenta, purple, and pink with haze, backlight, lens bloom, and atmospheric smoke, creating a high-energy reggaeton or urban pop concert mood. Confetti pieces float through the air across the frame. In the foreground, exactly 5 visible audience smartphones are raised and recording the performance, framing the scene from the crowd perspective. At the top center, add large bold brush-script lettering in Spanish reading La noche es nuestra., with “La noche” in white and “es nuestra.” in vivid hot pink, including a painted underline swoosh beneath the pink text. Place a small clean white Pollo.ai logo in the top-right corner. High contrast, cinematic live-event photography, glossy social-media ad aesthetic, sharp crowd detail with a silhouetted artist, vibrant neon nightlife energy, optimized for a mobile promotional poster.
